name: Kabul City
description: Afghanistan's capital and largest city, a hub for history, culture, and commerce.

name: Mazar-i-Sharif
description: Northern Afghanistan's largest city, famous for the Blue Mosque and Nawruz celebrations.

name: Herat City
description: Western Afghanistan's cultural capital, known for its Persian architecture and crafts.

name: Bamiyan City
description: High-altitude mountain city at 2,500 m, gateway to the famous Buddha niches.

name: Jalalabad
description: Warm-climate city on the Kabul River, known for its gardens and fruit orchards.

name: Faizabad
description: Remote northeastern city, gateway to Badakhshan's mountains and the Wakhan.

name: Kandahar City
description: Afghanistan's second city, the historic Pashtun capital.

name: Band-e Amir
description: Afghanistan's first national park – six jewel-coloured natural lakes in a high canyon.
